runs.description: Operations guide for installing and using Local Skills MCP in real projects. runs.description: Skill authoring and optimization guide for SKILL.md files. Use when users ask to create or revise skills, fix frontmatter (name/description) problems, improve trigger-routing keywords, interpret validate_skill errors/warnings, or run evaluate_skill with eval sets to benchmark and improve descriptions.
